top_findings.summary: The skill requests the ability to execute any Bash command (cmd:*) through the allowed-tools permission, which is excessive and unrelated to its stated primary purpose of managing notification dispatcher operations in business automation. While the skill is intended to provide guidance, generate code, and validate configurations, unrestricted command execution is not necessary and could enable actions beyond the scope of notification management, such as accessing sensitive system files, modifying unrelated data, or performing unauthorized operations, posing a security risk.
